source.note: Backlog trends are generated from Jira historical JQL snapshots (status and priority as-of each date). Business Unit UAT flow is generated from Jira issue changelogs. PR activity is sourced from GitHub pull requests across discovered organization repos and attributed by Jira-derived contributor mapping with repo ownership and Unmapped fallbacks.

prActivity.caveat: Counts are sourced from GitHub pull requests across discovered organization repos and attributed by the Jira-derived contributor-to-team map, falling back to committed repo-to-team mapping. Unmapped discovered repos only count when a mapped contributor authored the PR. Opened counts use non-draft PR createdAt, merged counts use mergedAt, sprint trend points render only closed sprints, and review-to-merge time uses the first submitted non-author GitHub review to mergedAt, excluding stale samples of 50 days or more.
